title: EEC Group
description: eecegypt.com zoominfo.com/c/eec-group/372746808 EEC Group (Engineering Enterprises for Civil & Steel Constructions S.A.E.) is an Egyptian engineering and construction conglomerate headquartered at EEC Tower, Sheraton Heliopolis, Cairo. Founded in 1977 as a construction company, it expanded into steel structure manufacturing in 1983 and became a telecom infrastructure turnkey contractor from 1996 onwards
